overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a coastal city sidewalk during golden hour. The character passes palm trees and futuristic traffic, walks under a yellow pedestrian overpass with street vendors, and transitions from open waterfront to a denser urban commercial area with billboards and modern towers.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal promenade with palm trees and traffic

events.description: character moves left to avoid cyclist passing on the right
yellow sports car and silver sedan pass by on the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront sidewalk with the ocean to the left

notable_agents.action: riding past the character on the sidewalk edge
walking in the opposite direction wearing dark clothing

entered.detail: calm sea visible beyond the concrete seawall
tall palm trees lining the coastal walkway
low wall separating sidewalk from the beach drop
busy road with multiple lanes of futuristic traffic
yellow elevated walkway structure visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an open coastal promenade during golden hour, with palm trees lining the left side and the ocean visible beyond a concrete wall. Futuristic cars pass by on the multi-lane road to the right. A cyclist and pedestrian pass by in opposite directions as the character approaches a yellow pedestrian overpass in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under yellow pedestrian overpass with street vendors

events.description: entering the covered area beneath the yellow pedestrian overpass
moving into shadow cast by the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the pedestrian overpass, following a cyclist ahead

notable_agents.action: riding ahead of the character on the sidewalk

entered.detail: small stalls and vendors set up under the overpass shelter
thick concrete pillars supporting the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath a yellow pedestrian overpass that provides partial cover from the sun, creating mixed lighting conditions. Street vendors line the left side under the shelter. The character follows a cyclist through the covered section as support pillars pass by on the right, with traffic continuing to flow on the adjacent road.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban commercial street with shops and billboards

events.description: exiting the overpass shadow into open commercial district

agents.ego_description: walking past commercial storefronts and approaching other pedestrians in the distance

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: ground floor shops and upper level buildings with neon signs
large digital advertisements mounted on building facades
tall futuristic skyscrapers visible in the background

segments.scene_description: Having passed under the overpass, the character emerges into a sunlit commercial district with shops lining the left side and large digital billboards on the right. The palm trees and ocean views are replaced by urban architecture and modern towers in the distance. The character continues walking along the sidewalk as the environment becomes more densely built-up.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a coastal promenade that gradually transitions into a dense, futuristic commercial district. It begins with the character walking past palm trees and a concrete sea wall under the warm glow of golden hour, while futuristic traffic flows along the adjacent road. As the character advances, the open scenery shifts into the partial shade of a yellow pedestrian overpass, where the camera follows a cyclist past a row of street vendors and heavy support pillars. The scene then opens up as the character emerges from the shelter into a sunlit urban corridor, where the ocean views are replaced by a line of shops and towering digital billboards. Finally, the environment becomes increasingly built-up, with the camera moving toward a skyline of modern towers and dense city architecture.
